CustomField.description: Last day of paid service. Formula = ADDMONTHS(Subscription_Start_Date__c, term) - 1 so a 12-month term starting 2026-01-01 ends 2026-12-31 (not 2027-01-01). Returns null if start date OR term is blank, and null if the term value is unmapped (so unmapped values surface as missing-data rather than silently zeroing TCV).
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(Subscription_Start_Date__c) || ISBLANK(TEXT(Subscription_Term_Months__c)), NULL, ADDMONTHS( Subscription_Start_Date__c, CASE( TEXT(Subscription_Term_Months__c), "12 Months", 12, "24 Months", 24, "36 Months", 36, NULL ) ) - 1 )
CustomField.label: Subscription End Date
